title_001: Five Elements Balance Test — Dopamine Lab
meta_001: Five Elements Balance Test — the Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water inside you
meta_002: No horoscope required — 20 questions measure the balance of five energies that drive you.
html_005: Borrowing the ancient language of the “Five Elements,”
html_006: this measures the balance of five energies
html_009: 🌱 The power to grow · 🔥 The power to blaze · ⛰ The power to hold steady · ⚔️ The power to cut through · 🌊 The power to flow.
html_011: we’ll reveal your strongest energy and the one you need to fill

—
    every choice is data, so the more honest you are, the more accurate it gets.
html_017: Five pillars grow in real time — which pillar means what stays a secret!

html_021: ※ This result reinterprets the Five Elements’ generating/overcoming cycle in the language of modern self-understanding.
html_023: T H E   M E A N I N G   &   F U N   F A C T O R Y
js_001: When a brilliant idea hits, I…

js_017: a little cluttered with things in progress

js_027: quietly looks after people and puts them at ease

js_062: The power to grow. The energy to start, reach outward, and grow around any obstacle.
js_063: You feel most alive starting something new and growing. Standing still is your worst stress.
js_064: Low on Wood, life can feel stuck in place. A tiny fresh start — a new walking route, a new hobby — is the cure.
js_066: The power to blaze. The energy to express, spread, and warm up people and rooms.
js_067: Passion and expression are your weapon. Managing the burnout after the blaze is a lifelong project.
js_068: Low on Fire, life goes lukewarm. Start by saying what you love out loud — expression is the spark.
js_070: The power to hold steady. The energy to protect, embrace, and become the center when things wobble.
js_071: People feel safe near you. Just don’t let your own place go empty while you look after everyone else.
js_072: Low on Earth, you feel unmoored. Small routines — regular meals, regular sleep — become your ground.
js_074: The power to cut through. The energy to set standards, clear the clutter, and bring things to a close.
js_075: Clarity is your gift. Just keep a sheath for that blade so it never turns on people close to you.
js_076: Low on Metal, unfinished things pile up. Pick one thing to finish today and practice closing it out.
js_078: The power to flow. The energy to watch, seep in, and read what’s invisible to others.
js_079: Depth and flexibility are your weapon. Just don’t stay submerged in thought so long that you never start.
js_080: Low on Water, you run without reflecting. Take 10 minutes a day to do nothing and let your thoughts flow.
js_083: ☯️ Wisdom of the Cycle — In the Five Elements,
js_086: energy has the power to awaken the “
js_087: ” side in the people around you.
